expectations.text: Output contains an OWM-format block
Uses TWO anchors (two 'anchor' lines) for the two user types
expectations.evidence: 2 anchors: ['client gets work done', 'freelancer wins paid work']

expectations.text: Both anchors represent distinct roles (e.g., client and freelancer)
expectations.evidence: anchors: ['client gets work done', 'freelancer wins paid work']

expectations.text: Both anchors at high visibility (>=0.9)

expectations.text: A platform/matching/marketplace component exists
Strategic analysis recognizes the two-sided dynamic

Cites at least one specific Wardley gameplay by name
expectations.evidence: cites: Focus on user needs, Structure & Culture, Open Approaches

expectations.text: Output contains an OWM-format block
At least 5 components identified
Every component has coordinates in [0,1]
Strategic analysis gives build/buy/outsource recommendations

Cloud infrastructure at Commodity/utility (epsilon >= 0.8)
